headline: Global Lung Cancer Surgery Market | Rise at 5.9% CAGR | Medtronic, Ethicon, Intuitive Surgical Drive Precision Oncology Advancements
summary: According to the latest market analysis by Future Market Insights, the global lung cancer surgery market is entering a phase of steady, quality-driven expansion, underpinned by rising cancer incidence and rapid adoption of minimally invasive and robotic-assisted surgical technologies. Valued at USD 1.6 billion in 2026 and projected to reach USD 2.8 billion by 2036, the market is expected to grow at a 5.9% CAGR, creating a sustained growth opportunity of USD 1.2 billion over the forecast period.
